description: A scheduled live stream for a gaming tournament fails to start at its designated time.

nodes.task_description: Check the connection status of the streaming encoder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the encoder is connected but not sending data.

nodes.task_description: Verify the stream key is correctly configured in the broadcasting software.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a mismatch between the configured stream key and the one assigned to the event.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the tournament organizer to update the stream key in their software and restart the stream.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct stream key and clear instructions, resolving the issue.
